name: AI Consumer Idea Portfolio
description: # Randy Stack 50 Cool, fun, challenging, rewarding ideas shaped around SAMAEL, REALM, AGON, Roviq, SelfRX, Forge, Airspace, Sentinel, and composure-sim. 1. OMEN PROVE - Build the DIU OMEN submission as an iPad demo with composure-sim running contested-envir...
notes: Portfolio tested `50` ideas across `7` scenarios and `6` audience segments.
Top-2 ideas score within `3` points of each other, which is below the kernel's resolution threshold. Treat as tied — pick the next real-world signal to gather instead of declaring a winner.
`forge-game` is the current top-ranked idea with score `53`.
`Social Commerce Conversion` is the least decisive scenario; gather more evidence there.
